seo.impact: Title may be too short to be descriptive for search engines.
seo.recommendation: Adjust title to be between 30-60 characters for optimal display in search results.

seo.impact: Canonical URL helps prevent duplicate content issues.
Page is accessible to search engines.
seo.recommendation: Robots meta tag is correctly configured.

seo.impact: Heading hierarchy is logical and helps search engines understand content structure.
Images without alt text are not accessible and miss SEO opportunities.
seo.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text to all images for accessibility and SEO.

seo.impact: Alt text is descriptive and helpful.
Open Graph tags improve how the page appears when shared on social media.
Twitter Card tags improve how the page appears when shared on Twitter.

aeo.impact: Missing schema markup reduces visibility in answer engines.
aeo.recommendation: Add JSON-LD schema markup (Article, FAQPage, HowTo, etc.) to help answer engines.

aeo.impact: Valid schema markup ensures answer engines can parse and use your structured data.
aeo.recommendation: Ensure schema markup is valid JSON-LD format.

aeo.description: Multiple schema types for knowledge graph
aeo.impact: Single schema type limits knowledge graph opportunities.
aeo.recommendation: Consider adding multiple schema types (Article + FAQPage, etc.) for richer context.

aeo.impact: Missing FAQ structure reduces chances of appearing in answer boxes.
aeo.recommendation: Add FAQPage schema for Q&A content to improve answer engine visibility.

aeo.impact: Concise answers at the start help answer engines extract featured snippets.
aeo.recommendation: Ensure key answers appear in the first 40-60 words of paragraphs.

aeo.impact: Lists and tables make content easier for answer engines to extract.
aeo.recommendation: Use bulleted lists, numbered lists, and tables for scannable content.

aeo.impact: Missing question-based headings reduces answer engine matching.
aeo.recommendation: Use question-based headings (What is...? How to...?) to match user queries.

aeo.impact: Clear hierarchy helps answer engines understand content relationships.
aeo.recommendation: Maintain clear content hierarchy with proper heading structure.

aeo.impact: E-E-A-T signals (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trust) improve credibility.
aeo.recommendation: Include author credentials, publication dates, and citations for E-E-A-T.

geo.details: AI crawlers (GPTBot, Claude-Web, etc.) are allowed
geo.impact: AI crawlers can access and learn from your content.
LLMs.txt helps AI systems understand how to cite and use your content.
geo.recommendation: Create an LLMs.txt file to guide AI systems on content usage and attribution.

geo.impact: Content lacks citation-ready chunks for AI systems.
geo.recommendation: Structure content in 30-150 word paragraphs for easy AI citation.

geo.impact: Statistics make content more authoritative for AI systems.
External citations increase content credibility for AI systems.
Missing author information reduces content trustworthiness for AI.
geo.recommendation: Add author bylines with credentials to establish expertise.

geo.description: Descriptive image alt text for AI
geo.details: 0% of images have quality alt text
geo.impact: Poor alt text quality limits AI understanding of visual content.
geo.recommendation: Use detailed, descriptive alt text (not filenames) for AI image understanding.

geo.impact: Transcripts make multimedia content accessible to AI systems.
geo.recommendation: Provide transcripts for all video and audio content.

geo.impact: Conversational language matches how users ask AI questions.
geo.recommendation: Use natural, conversational language in headings and content.

geo.impact: Original insights make content more valuable for AI citation.
geo.recommendation: Include unique perspectives, case studies, and original research.

accessibility.details: Color contrast analysis requires screenshot processing
accessibility.impact: Critical for users with visual impairments
accessibility.recommendation: Ensure text has 4.5:1 contrast ratio (3:1 for large text)

accessibility.details: Touch target analysis requires screenshot processing
accessibility.impact: Users with motor impairments struggle with small targets
Screen readers cannot identify unlabeled input purposes
accessibility.recommendation: Add <label> elements or aria-label to all form inputs

accessibility.details: Found 7 landmark(s): header, nav, search, button, main, footer, tabpanel
accessibility.impact: Screen readers can quickly navigate page sections
accessibility.recommendation: Add semantic HTML5 elements (nav, main, footer) or ARIA roles

accessibility.impact: Keyboard users must tab through entire nav on every page
accessibility.recommendation: Add a 'skip to main content' link as the first focusable element

accessibility.impact: Screen readers cannot determine correct pronunciation
accessibility.recommendation: Add lang attribute to <html> tag (e.g., <html lang='en'>)

mobile.impact: Page will not be mobile-responsive without viewport tag

mobile.details: Mobile layout analysis requires screenshot comparison
mobile.impact: Users must scroll horizontally to read content
Small text is difficult to read on mobile
mobile.recommendation: Increase base font size to at least 16px

mobile.impact: Users don't see primary action immediately
mobile.recommendation: Place primary CTA above the fold on mobile

visualDesign.details: Score: 7/10. Clear visual hierarchy with bold headlines and distinguishable sections, but some images are too prominent, slightly overwhelming text importance.
visualDesign.impact: Users cannot quickly scan and understand content
visualDesign.recommendation: Use size, color, and spacing to create clear hierarchy

visualDesign.details: Score: 6/10. Adequate whitespace between sections and images, but some areas feel a bit cramped due to dense image placements.
visualDesign.impact: Cramped design is hard to read and scan

visualDesign.details: Score: 8/10. Typography is clear and legible with good contrast, but could benefit from varied font sizes to enhance emphasis.
visualDesign.impact: Too many fonts create visual chaos

visualDesign.details: Score: 7/10. Consistent color scheme that matches the brand identity, though more contrast could help in certain text areas.
visualDesign.impact: Inconsistent colors confuse users and dilute brand
visualDesign.recommendation: Use a consistent palette of 3-5 primary colors

visualDesign.details: Score: 7/10. Effective grid use aligns content well, but occasional misalignments in image placements detract slightly.
visualDesign.recommendation: Align elements using a grid system

visualDesign.details: Score: 8/10. Overall balance is well-maintained across the page with a cohesive layout that draws the eye naturally through the content.
visualDesign.impact: Unbalanced layouts feel awkward and unfinished
visualDesign.recommendation: Distribute visual weight evenly across the page

userExperience.details: Score: 6/10. Above-the-fold content provides a clear brand message but lacks immediate CTAs or engagement points.
userExperience.impact: Users might leave if they don't see value immediately
userExperience.recommendation: Place value proposition and CTA above the fold

userExperience.details: Score: 7/10. Value proposition is clear yet might benefit from stronger calls to action or highlighted key benefits.
userExperience.impact: Users don't understand what you offer
userExperience.recommendation: Add a clear headline explaining your value proposition

userExperience.details: Score: 5/10. Minimal CTAs present; potential missed opportunities for engagement and conversion.
userExperience.impact: Users don't know what action to take

userExperience.details: Score: 8/10. Intuitive navigation with clear labels, but sub-navigation might enhance user experience further.
userExperience.impact: Users cannot find what they're looking for
userExperience.recommendation: Use simple, descriptive labels for navigation

userExperience.details: Score: 7/10. Trust indicators are subtle; integrating testimonials or client logos could enhance credibility further.
userExperience.impact: Users may not trust the site without social proof
userExperience.recommendation: Add testimonials, partner logos, or trust seals

personas.details: Score: 6/10. The site includes ample content but lacks clear educational resources or glossaries for deeper learning.
personas.impact: Site may not meet the needs of Aspiring Brand Strategist / Student.
personas.recommendation: Optimize for: Clarity, educational value, glossaries, clear headings, easy navigation.

personas.details: Score: 5/10. Limited academic references or citations provided; not ideal for rigorous research needs.
personas.impact: Site may not meet the needs of Intern / Graduate Researcher.
personas.recommendation: Optimize for: Citations, authorship, publication dates, depth of analysis, methodology.

personas.details: Score: 7/10. Practical examples and case studies are present, however, more implementation guides could be useful.
personas.impact: Site may not meet the needs of Middle Management.
personas.recommendation: Optimize for: Case studies, practical frameworks, ROI arguments, implementation guides.

personas.details: Score: 6/10. Site presents trends in branding but offers limited unique data or proprietary insights for high-level consulting.
personas.impact: Site may not meet the needs of Senior Brand Consultant.
personas.recommendation: Optimize for: Unique insights, latest trends, proprietary data, expert opinions, white papers.

cialdini.details: Score: 5/10. Few upfront value offerings; more free resources could strengthen reciprocity principles.
cialdini.impact: Missed opportunity for persuasion via Reciprocity.
cialdini.recommendation: Does the site offer value upfront (e.g., free guides, templates, valuable content) before asking for anything (email, purchase)? Is the 'ask' balanced with the 'give'?

cialdini.details: Score: 8/10. Content conveys expertise with authoritative tone; credentials could be highlighted more prominently.
cialdini.impact: Missed opportunity for persuasion via Authority.
cialdini.recommendation: Does the content demonstrate expertise? Are author credentials, awards, certifications, or partnerships visible? Is the tone authoritative and confident?

cialdini.details: Score: 7/10. Relatable brand voice and appealing design, yet more personal stories or behind-the-scenes content could enhance relatability.
cialdini.impact: Missed opportunity for persuasion via Liking.
cialdini.recommendation: Is the brand voice relatable and human? Is the 'About Us' page engaging? excellent design and aesthetics? Do the images show real people?

cialdini.details: Score: 4/10. No obvious use of scarcity; limited-time offers or exclusive content may enhance urgency without being overused.
cialdini.impact: Missed opportunity for persuasion via Scarcity.
cialdini.recommendation: Are there limited-time offers, exclusive content, or indications of high demand? Is scarcity used ethically to encourage action?

metadata.title: Our work
metadata.description: See how we're transforming marketing execution for the world’s best brands with examples of our award-winning work from across a wide range of sectors.
